Professional Maritime Courses

-

Explore our industry-leading training programs designed to prepare the next generation of Marine Engineers and Officers for global maritime careers.

+ + -
-
Pre-Sea Courses
-
Post-Sea Courses

+ +
+
+
PRE SEA COURSES
+ Apply Now +
+

This 12 months course is mandatory for continuing with the 6 months Shipboard + training prior to appearing for Class IV Certificate of Competency exam (MEO Class-IV) to become an + Officer in charge of an Engineering Watch in a manned engine room or as a designated duty engineer in a + periodically unmanned engine room of Merchant Ships. METI has engaged with the Institute of Marine + Engineers to enlist as student members of IME which enables them to be in the forefront of marine + engineering technology as it evolves. +

+
    +
  1. GME
    2. +
  2. Basic Training in Oil & Chemical Tanker Cargo Operations
    3. +
  3. Basic Training for Liquified Gas Tanker Cargo Operations
    4. +
+ +

Engineering

Graduate Marine Engineering (GME)

-
- -

-
-
- -
Duration: 1 Year Residential

Admission Journey

-
-
Step 1: Application
-

Register online and upload required academic documents.

-
-
-
Step 2: Entrance Exam

Appear for the Common Entrance Test conducted by IMU.

POST SEA COURSES
+ Apply Now +

This 12 months course is mandatory for continuing with the 6 months Shipboard + training prior to appearing for Class IV Certificate of Competency exam (MEO Class-IV) to become an + Officer in charge of an Engineering Watch in a manned engine room or as a designated duty engineer in a + periodically unmanned engine room of Merchant Ships. METI has engaged with the Institute of Marine + Engineers to enlist as student members of IME which enables them to be in the forefront of marine + engineering technology as it evolves. +

Direct NEFT/RTGS

Bank transfer directly to the CSL Corporate account.

-.admission-process +
+
+
+
+
+
+

+ + Admission Process +

+

+ METI follows a clear and student-friendly admission workflow so applicants can understand each stage + easily and complete the process without confusion. +

+
+
What you should keep ready
+
+
Academic mark sheets and certificates
+
Government ID proof and passport-size photographs
+
Eligibility details and active contact information
+
+
+
+
+ +
+
+
+
+
01
+
+ +
+
Submit Application
+

Fill in the application form with your personal, academic, and course preference details.

+
+
+ +
+
+
02
+
+ +
+
Document Submission
+

Upload or provide the required certificates, ID proof, and supporting documents for review.

+
+
+ +
+
+
03
+
+ +
+
Verification
+

The admission team checks eligibility, verifies documents, and guides you on the next formalities.

+
+
+ +
+
+
04
+
+ +
+
Admission Confirmation
+

Complete fee payment and confirm your seat for the selected course at METI.

+
+
+
+ +
+
+
Need help with your application?
+

Our admission office can support you with eligibility guidance, documents, and course selection.

+
+ Apply Now +
+
+

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
Course & Admission

Start your journey in maritime excellence with CSL METI.

Our Courses
Admission Process
Admission Details
Fee Payment

Professional Maritime Courses

Explore our industry-leading training programs designed to prepare the next generation of Marine Engineers and Officers for global maritime careers.

Pre-Sea Courses
Post-Sea Courses
Engineering

Graduate Marine Engineering (GME)

Eligibility: B.E/B.Tech (Mech / Naval Arch)
Duration: 1 Year Residential
Apply Now
Overview
  • 12 Months Fully Residential
  • 60% Practical 'On-the-job' Training
  • Mandatory for Class IV COC
Academic Categories
  • B.E/B.Tech Mechanical Engineering
  • Mechanical Streams (Automation/Elec)
  • Naval Architecture Streams
  • Marine Eng (Non-DGS/AICTE)
Medical Standards
  • Height: 157cm Min
  • No Color Blindness
  • Good Hearing (ILO Norms)
Requirements
  • Valid Indian Passport
  • Age: Max 28 years
  • English: 50% in X / XII / Degree
Sponsorship: A guarantee letter from a Shipping Company / Manning Agency is required for 6 months on-board training.
Tanker

Oil & Chemical Tanker Cargo Operation (OCTCO)

Eligibility: 10th Pass + BST
Duration: 6 Days
Apply Now
Overview

Specialized training for personnel with duties on oil and chemical tankers.

Eligibility
  • 10th Pass
  • Valid BST Certificate
Course Details
  • Duration: 6 Days
  • DGS Approved
Requirements
  • Medical Fitness
  • Valid INDoS No.
Tanker

Liquefied Gas Tanker Operation (GTCO)

Eligibility: 10th Pass + BST
Duration: 4.5 Days
Apply Now
Overview

Mandatory training for safe cargo operations on liquefied gas tankers.

Eligibility
  • 10th Pass
  • Valid BST Certificate
Course Details
  • Duration: 4.5 Days
  • DGS Approved
Requirements
  • Medical Fitness
  • Valid INDoS No.
Basic Safety

Basic Safety Training (BST)

Eligibility: 10th Pass
Duration: 12 Days
Apply Now

Mandatory foundation course for all maritime professionals, covering personal survival techniques, fire prevention, elementary first aid, and social responsibilities.

Safety

Advance Fire Fighting

Mandatory course for sea personnel
Duration: 5 Days
Apply Now

Advanced Fire Fighting provides training for masters and officers to take charge of fire-fighting operations. It covers fire control, organization of fire parties, and use of advanced fire detection systems.

Medical

Medical First Aid

Comprehensive first aid training
Duration: 3 Days
Apply Now

Medical First Aid training is essential for seafarers to provide immediate medical care in case of accidents or illnesses on board. It covers basic life support, resuscitation, and handling of medical emergencies.

Admission Journey

Step 1: Application

Register online and upload required academic documents.

Step 2: Entrance Exam

Appear for the Common Entrance Test conducted by IMU.

Step 3: Verification

Document verification and background check at our campus.

General Admission Details

Age Criteria

Maximum 28 years (relaxable for SC/ST candidates).

Medical Fitness

Must be cleared by DGS approved medical examiners.

Fee Payment Options

We offer multiple convenient channels for fee remittance to ensure a hassle-free admission process.

Online Net Banking / UPI

Instant payment through our secure payment gateway.

Demand Draft (DD)

Favoring "Cochin Shipyard Limited" payable at Kochi.

Direct NEFT/RTGS

Bank transfer directly to the CSL Corporate account.
